title: lilium bulbiferum var. atrosanguineum
intro: Lilium bulbiferum var. atrosanguineum, also known as the blood-red lily or atrosanguineum lily, is a variety of the lily bulbiferum plant, characterized by its deep red flowers and bulbous base. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid and flavonoid compounds. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The herbal preparations of Lilium bulbiferum var. atrosanguineum include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and other health problems.
